backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Setup.bat now skips the trailing pause on -Unattended success so the tray Apply Update / Rollback flows do not leave a stranded admin console window after the install finishes. Interactive manual installs still pause as before. Errors always pause regardless of -Unattended so failure causes stay readable. Same Setup.bat covers both flows — the only difference is the runtime arg.
